dominant_palette: red, white, black, lime/neon green, cream/off-white
composition_vocabulary: Split between two modes: clean centered objects on flat white or solid-colour grounds (product-logic framing) and full-bleed typographic posters where text is the visual. Body-part crop shots (hands, torso) bridge the two. Very little negative space; tiles tend to fill the frame edge-to-edge.
lighting_quality: Predominantly flat — studio product lighting or graphic/digital colour fields; natural or atmospheric light is nearly absent across the sample.
material_textures: polished metal, knit fabric, denim, skin, coated card/paper, vinyl/plastic
aesthetic_register: Streetwear-adjacent contemporary: the board reads as creative-youth identity culture (music, art-world in-jokes, logo worship) rather than heirloom luxury — jewellery appears but is styled within that streetwear frame, not as the centrepiece.
notably_absent: Classical luxury signals are almost entirely missing — no dark velvet staging, no stone or gemstone close-ups, no antiquarian or heirloom props, no chiaroscuro or candlelit atmosphere, no neutral 'quiet luxury' palette.
